---
title: "How to Prepare for an R Quiz"
---

```{=html}
<iframe src="How to Prepare for an R Quiz.pdf" width="100%" height="800" style="border:1px solid #ddd;"></iframe>
[Open in new tab](How to Prepare for an R Quiz.pdf){target=_blank rel="noopener"}
 ·
[Download PDF](How to Prepare for an R Quiz.pdf)
